101.name: Dysmotility (includes slow gastric emptying, neurologic gut, slow motility)

105.name: Infant Feeding Issues (Includes poor sucking, chewing)

110.name: Genital system, abnormal (includes reproductive system, menses, irregular periods, cryptorchidism, torsion)

111.name: Genitourinary Infections (Includes pyelonephritis, chronic yeast infections, urinary tract infections (UTIs), recurrent UTIs)

114.name: Urinary System, Abnormal (includes bladder atonia, abnormal ureters, urine flow obstruction, structural defects)

120.name: Body weight, abnormal (includes overweight, underweight, obesity, weight gain)

14.name: Consumption Behaviors, Abnormal (Includes changes in eating and/or drinking)

142.name: Oral Motor Impairment (Includes tongue thrusting, tongue abnormalities, macroglossia, sucking and swallowing disorders, frequent drooling, excessive chewing, mouthing behaviors, and feeding difficulties, teeth grinding)

143.name: Paralysis (includes hemiplegia, limb, arm, leg paralysis, no voluntary movement)

144.name: Progressive loss of skills (regression) (includes fine and/or gross motor skills)

146.name: Craniofacial abnormalities (Includes: skull abnormalities, torticollis, nose abnormalities, midline retraction, abnormal eyebrows, puffy cheeks, long chin, cleft palate, high arched palate, prominent mandible, jaw abn...

147.name: Dental Abnormalities (Includes abnormal dentition, large front teeth, missing adult teeth)

148.name: Hands and Feet Abnormalities (includes hypoplastic distal phlanges in the hand and feet, broad hallux phalanx and thumb, proximal placement of thumb, arachnotidactyly fingers, curled fingers, Navicular bone drop,  Cal...

150.name: Joint Abnormalities (Includes laxity, hypermobility, pain, radial head dislocation, congenital hip dislocation)

152.name: Rib and Chest Abnormalities (Includes sternum malformation, wide ribs)

156.name: Long Bone Abnormalities (Includes twisted, shortened tibia and/or fibula)

157.name: Skeletal Maturation Abnormalities (Includes bone age advanced, bone age delayed, osteoporosis, osteopenia, soft bones)

158.name: Spine Abnormalities (Includes scoliosis, spina bifida, kyphosis, spinal stenosis, saccral dimple)

159.name: Spasms and Contractures (Includes contractions, involuntary movement, muscle cramps)

16.name: Crying, abnormal (includes spontaneous, inconsolable, lack of)

160.name: Ankle pronation (some inward rolling of ankle and foot)

171.name: Microcephaly, small head circumference, includes primary and secondary

18.name: Social Behavior, abnormal (Includes inappropriate behavior, overly friendly, physical contact seeking/avoiding, attention seeking, interest in others, emotional immaturity)

185.name: Seizures (focal, tonic'-'clonic, myoclonic, resistant or progressive seizure type)

195.name: Rolandic Seizures (during transition between sleeping and waking)

216.name: Birth weight, abnormal (includes intrauterine growth restriction (IUGR))

217.name: Pregnancy complications (includes threatened abortion, gestational diabetes)

218.name: Fetal physiology, abnormal (includes jaundice, congenital pneumonia)

220.name: Amniotic Fluid, Abnormal (includes Oligohydramnios and Polyhydramnios)

224.name: Hair Growth, Abnormal (Hypertrichosis, excess or lack of hair)

228.name: Sensitive Skin/Dermatitis (Includes eczema, psoriasis, rashes, lumps, bumps)

229.name: Skin Color, Abnormal (Includes flushing, circulation issues, lacy pattern, mottling)

23.name: Maladaptive behaviors (includes biting, hair'-'pulling, pinching slapping, yelling)

230.name: Sweating, Abnormal (Includes absent or reduced sweating, hyperhidrosis)

231.name: Temperature Regulation, Poor (Includes hot and cold sensitivity)

233.name: Circadian Abnormalities (sleep wake cycle in 24 hours)

237.name: Initiation and Maintenance Difficulties of Sleep (Includes dyssomnia, restlessness, need for physical proximity to caregiver)

25.name: Oppositional behaviors, includes oppositional defiance disorder

251.name: Cortical Visual Impairment (Includes suspected but not proven)

253.name: Nystagmus (Includes Nystagmus'-'like, opsoclonus'-'like eye movement issue, aberrant gaze saccades)

255.name: Eye, Anatomical Abnormalities (includes epicanthic folds, downslanting palpebral fissures, asymetrical ptosis, puffy eyelids, long eyelashes)

258.name: Strabismus (includes abnormal eye movements, tracking difficulties, exotropia)

259.name: Visual Impairment (includes peripheral vision loss, nearsightedness, farsightedness, needs glasses)

26.name: Repetitive behaviors (includes OCD, hand-wringing, compulsions, rituals, loud repetitive vocalizations)

265.name: Academic Support Needed, IEP, Individualized Education Plan

27.name: Fixated interest, or atypical interest in or use of objects (such as water, crinkly items, mirrors, reflections, paper, twirling hair, music, outdoors, ceiling fans, vehicles, opening closing doors

273.name: Behaviors are challenging in social situations, such as yelling, stubbornness, demanding, or withdrawn

274.name: Communication, difficult to be understood outside the family

275.name: Engaged socially (Capable of social engagement, establishing intentional relationships)

277.name: Impulsive or Inappropriate social behavior (may greet people with grabbing, overly friendly)

279.name: Law enforcement encounters - includes security guards and police (individual impact)

281.name: Safety (cross street, elopement, burn risk), Judgement Impaired, Danger Awareness Decreased

283.name: Social isolation (includes isolation because of treatments, inability to communicate, inability to move)

284.name: Sports or Play with others (difficult or impossible)

285.name: Transitioning issues (difficulty adapting to change, routine needed, rigid behavior)

29.name: Sensory behavior, abnormal (sensory-seeking, spinning, eye'-'poking, hair brushing, touching hands)

305.name: Self Care and Daily Living Impact

306.name: Activities of Daily Living (ADL): Requires 100% Support

307.name: Assistance with Activities of Daily Living (ADL): Requires Partial Support

31.name: Self'-'Injurious Behavior (include self'-'harm, head banging, trichotillomania, wound picking, skin picking, biting self)

313.name: Household tasks assistance needed (includes preparing food)

315.name: Regression in Activities of Daily Living (ADL)

320.name: Advocacy Role, advocacy for patient provided by caregiver

324.name: Medical Care'-' medical interventions must be provided by caregiver and family members(medications, bowl wash out, chest physio, etc.)

325.name: Time needed for care (e.g. feeding, morning & bedtime routines, organization of medical care)

333.name: Household tasks (difficult to complete), includes caring for other children

338.name: Embarrassment (managing behavior of child in public)

34.name: Cardiac Defect/Structural Abnormality (pulmonary atresia, murmur, mitral valve disease, enlarged, atrial septal defects, arrythmia, murmur, bradycardia, low heart rate)

343.name: Impact on intimate relationship, marital strain, divorce

347.name: Vigilance and flexibility needed to care for child

355.name: Injuries (risk of falling and increased injuries due to assisting younger children exploratory behaviors, impulse control)

356.name: Medical and therapy appointments for parents increased due to issues caused by child's disorder (injuries, psychiatric)

360.name: Independence, mobility, and agency decreased due to child's need for daily care

361.name: Law enforcement encounters - includes security guards and police (caregiver impact)

365.name: Socialization and leisure activities reduced or modified

378.name: Adaptive equipment (includes technology, like AAC devices and zoom/telehealth)

380.name: Cleaner, Landscaper, Chef, Personal Assistant, Gardener, Dog Walker

39.name: Blood pressure, abnormal (hypertension, hypotension, high, low)

391.name: Regional differences in access to services, insurance and medical care

393.name: Treatment for family members (anxiety medication, counseling)

395.name: Community via facebook, foundation and support groups

40.name: Lower Respiratory Infections, recurrent, includes pneumonia

41.name: Respiration, Abnormal (Includes Asthma, Hypoxia, Restrictive Airway Disease)

416.name: Alternative and/or Augmentative Communication Devices Used

435.name: Sanitary Measure, Excessive Needed to Prevent Infection

438.name: albuterol, levalbuterol, ProAir, Proventil, Ventolin, Xopenex

450.name: CBD with or without THC, Jayden's Juice, Charlotte's web, (non'-'FDA approved)

456.name: diazepam, Diastat Rectal Gel, Valtoco nasal spray, Valium

493.name: opioids, oxycodone, fentanyl, morphine, hydrocodone, hydromorphone Percocet, Oxycontin, Lortab, Vicodin, Dilaudid

502.name: Reflux, stomach, chronic vomitting, dymotility medication (unspecified)

509.name: sennosides, bisacodyl, Senna, Dulcolax, stimulant laxatives

515.name: valproic acid, VPA, depakene, Depekote, Divalproex

53.name: Reduced consciousness (includes coma, vegetative state, unconscious)

54.name: Executive Function Skills, Impaired (logic, planning, time'-'management, organization)

540.name: Play therapy (developmental therapy, neuropsychomotricity, psychomotrocity, psychomotor therapy)

55.name: Global Developmental Delay (Children < 5, includes Vineland, VABS-3, lower adaptive behavior)

67.name: Non-speaking communication through the use of eye contact, facial expression, body postures and gestures

68.name: Verbal Language can be used to Communicate (Includes few words)

76.name: Verbal Approximation, vocalizes but does not have full speech (baba, wawa)

78.name: Anxiety (includes panic attacks, social anxiety, separation anxiety)

85.name: Neuropsychiatric Issues (includes suspicion of bipolar, bipolar, hallucinations, catatonia, schizophrenia, depression)
